channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A grad student's wild idea sparks a major aging breakthrough
item.description: A casual conversation between graduate students helped spark a breakthrough in aging research at Mayo Clinic. Researchers discovered that tiny synthetic...

item.title: Scientists 'bottle the sun' with a liquid battery that stores solar energy
item.description: Scientists at UC Santa Barbara have created a remarkable new material that works like a 'rechargeable solar battery,' storing sunlight inside tiny molecules...

item.title: NSF launches $1.5B X-Labs initiative for breakthrough science efforts
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced $1.5 billion over the next decade for the NSF X-Labs initiative to address critical scientific challenges.

item.title: Giant stealth magma surge triggered thousands of quakes beneath Atlantic island
item.description: A massive magma surge pushed upward from over 20 kilometers underground beneath Portugal's São Jorge Island in 2022, causing thousands of earthquakes.
